revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月30日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の30日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1596年]][[12月19日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（+ [[1662年]]） * [[康熙]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[12月3日]]） - [[雍正帝]]、[[清]]の5代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1735年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1326年]][[11月25日]]） - [[惟康親王]]{{要出典|date=2021-03}}、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1264年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月27日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、国学者（* [[1697年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[12月3日]]） - [[高野長英]]、[[蘭学医]]（* [[1804年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|29|11|1|9|30|11|10|1030}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月30日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の30日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。

== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1326年]][[11月25日]]） - [[惟康親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1264年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月27日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、国学者（* [[1697年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[12月3日]]） - [[高野長英]]、[[蘭学医]]（* [[1804年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed}}<!--taken from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Chinese_calendar&oldid=1278636661 this is present on day 30 of all months, so add it to every single page here when you find a source for one of them-->
<!-- {{Lunar October}} ''October 30'''<!--Lunar October30 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の30日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events ==
== Births == * [[慶長]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1596年]][[12月19日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（+ [[1662年]]） * [[康熙]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[12月3日]]） - [[雍正帝]]、[[清]]の5代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1735年]]）
== Deaths == * [[嘉暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1326年]][[11月25日]]） - [[惟康親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1264年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月27日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、国学者（* [[1697年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[12月3日]]） - [[高野長英]]、[[蘭学医]]（* [[1804年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|29|11|1|9|30|11|10|1030}}

As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). [[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}元年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1596|ja|1596}}{{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}}） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}}、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}}（+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}}） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙}}17年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1678|ja|1678}}{{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}}、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}}の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}}（+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}}12年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1584|ja|1584}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}}) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}}5年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1715|ja|1715}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}}) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}}4年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1747|ja|1747}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}})

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}元年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1596|ja|1596}}{{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}}） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}}、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}}（+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}}） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙}}17年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1678|ja|1678}}{{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}}、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}}の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}}（+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}}）

[[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] [[zh:十月初七]] [[en:draft:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:null category]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] [[zh:十月初七]] [[en:draft:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[sn:ctober 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[Category:U]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[Category:U]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}元年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1596|ja|1596}}{{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}}） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}}、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}}（+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}}） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙}}17年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1678|ja|1678}}{{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}}、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}}の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}}（+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}}12年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1584|ja|1584}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}}) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}}5年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1715|ja|1715}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}}) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}}4年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1747|ja|1747}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}})
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Old Lunar Calendar 10 Month]] to [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}元年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1596|ja|1596}}{{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}}） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}}、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}}（+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}}） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙}}17年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1678|ja|1678}}{{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}}、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}}の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}}（+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}}12年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1584|ja|1584}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}}) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}}5年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1715|ja|1715}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}}) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}}4年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1747|ja|1747}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}})
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:蘇我入鹿の紫冠授与]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}1st year（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1596|ja|1596}}{{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}}） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}}、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}}（+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}}） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙}}17年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1678|ja|1678}}{{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}}、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}}の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}}（+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}}12年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1584|ja|1584}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}}) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}}5年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1715|ja|1715}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}}) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}}4年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1747|ja|1747}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}})
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}}12nd year（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1584|ja|1584}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}}) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}}5th year（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1715|ja|1715}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}}) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}}4th year（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1747|ja|1747}}{{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}})

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). [[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[October 30 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）

[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|皇帝}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[ja:蘇我入鹿の紫冠授与]]

[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). revision.text:
[[sn:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] [[zh:十月三十]] [[en:draft:October 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[ja:蘇我入鹿の紫冠授与]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665}} )

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海|12=draft|12=draft}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=draft|12=draft}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|12=draft|12=draft}} )

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} )

revision.text:
[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 30 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 30 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 30 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月三十]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 19|ja|12月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|ja|松平信綱|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Rōchū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Yongzheng|ja|雍正帝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} )

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月30日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の30日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1596年]][[12月19日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（+ [[1662年]]） * [[康熙]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[12月3日]]） - [[雍正帝]]、[[清]]の5代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1735年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1326年]][[11月25日]]） - [[惟康親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1264年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月27日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、国学者（* [[1697年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[12月3日]]） - [[高野長英]]、[[蘭学医]]（* [[1804年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|29|11|1|9|30|11|10|1030}}

{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1596|qq=}} [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1662|qq=}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1584|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1561|qq=}} ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=}} [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1639|qq=}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1665|qq=}} ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1596|qq=}} [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1662|qq=}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=}} ）

{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1596|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1662|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1584|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1561|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1639|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1665|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1596|ja|1596|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1596|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1662|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1584|ja|1584|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1584|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1561|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1639|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1665|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}
