revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ {{ill|1662|ja|1662|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1662|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1639|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1665|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]]

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1678|ja|1678|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ {{ill|1735|ja|1735|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1735|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1747|ja|1747|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1747|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

{{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|qq=|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|qq=|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] to [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月三十]][[zh:十月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840193]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 30|qq=October 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]] ） - [[:en:Matsudaira Nobutsuna|Matsudaira Nobutsuna]] 、{{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Rōjū|Rōchū]] （+ [[:en:1662|1662]] ） * {{ill|Kangxi|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） - [[:en:Yongzheng Emperor|Emperor Yongzheng]] 、[[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] の5代{{ill|Emperor|ja|Emperor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エンペラー|1=Emperor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q394836}} （+ [[:en:1735|1735]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ) * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ) * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ) == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
